title: Elysian Horizon
description: A beautiful modpack with a lots of custom mobs, bosses, tools and mechanicts
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca14092fc451a2587a1906c6fc6e330f7949e4fa.png)
#
Elysian Horizon
Embark on an unforgettable journey into the world of Elysian Horizon! This modpack is for adventurers who want to explore, build, and create. Whether you want to wander through wild lands, build epic structures, or design complex machines, this pack has everything you need to start your next great adventure.


Key Features ### 🗺️ Adventure & Exploration Discover a completely **overhauled world**, full of new biomes from mods like **Terralith**, **Regions Unexplored**, and **Ecologics**. Delve into the mysterious dimensions of **The Aether** and **Deeper and Darker**, and explore redesigned caves, fortresses, and dungeons. Along your way, you'll encounter hundreds of unique new structures, from hidden dungeons to lively towns, thanks to mods like **Dungeons and Taverns** and **When Dungeons Arise**. ### ⚙️ Mechanics & Technology Unleash your creativity with the **Create** mod and its numerous add-ons, which allow you to build complex, automated factories and powerful machines. Build your own vehicle with **Automobility** and travel the world in style. Additionally, **sophisticated backpacks**, **expanded storage**, and new building tools will make managing your resources a breeze. ### ⚔️ New Mobs & Items Prepare for encounters with **new bosses** and hordes of monsters from **Mowzie's Mobs** and **Mutant Monsters**. Acquire powerful, rare artifacts and enhanced weapons and tools to help you survive in this dangerous world. ### 🏡 Building & Decor Transform every block into a work of art with **hundreds of new blocks, furniture, and decorative variants**. Create unique bridges, roofs, windows, and furniture with **Macaw's** mods, and use a variety of new block styles to bring your builds to life. ### 🌠 Realism & Optimization Enjoy the beauty of your world with **realistic visual effects** (dynamic lighting, realistic trees, and animations) and **full shader support**. At the same time, the modpack is fully **optimized** to run smoothly even on lower-end PCs, thanks to mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **ModernFix**.
![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c227767af6808f8a0b65924876152768047ff056.png) ## Thank you! A big thank you to all who downloaded, supported, and sent in suggestions for this modpack! ♥
